description: Auto-fill Data Umum (Section A) in the health test form from hrd_karyawan employee data so users don't need to type Nama, Usia, Jenis Kelamin, and Golongan Darah manually.
steps: In modalFormTestKesehatan(), after const du = data.dataUmum || {}, add code to fetch employee data from hrd_karyawan when dataUmum fields are empty
Calculate age (usia) from karyawan's tanggalLahir field
Create autoNama, autoUsia, autoGender, autoGolDarah variables with priority: dataUmum > karyawan > currentUser
Update HTML template to use the auto-filled values instead of direct du.xxx references
acceptance_criteria: When opening the form, Nama/Usia/Jenis Kelamin/Golongan Darah are pre-filled from hrd_karyawan data
Previously saved dataUmum values take priority over karyawan data
Age is calculated from tanggalLahir field
Nama field remains readonly for scheduled tests (when id is provided)
verification: Grep for karyawanData in the file
Grep for autoNama, autoUsia, autoGender, autoGolDarah variables
